_comment: EXAMPLE ONLY — never commit real secrets. At runtime each value is mounted as its own file at the frozen /run/secrets/* path and loaded via the corresponding *_FILE environment variable. A redirected (non-frozen) secret-file path is rejected at startup (WP5-4). The Authorization header uses the raw CSPR.cloud token, never a 'Bearer ' prefix.

x402_official_signer.usage: held for the Codex-run live canary; unused by the offline service
